name: King Of Water
short_description: The classic big fish eat small fish game. You will grow step by step from a small shrimp to an invincible existence. Dodge dangers from land, chase weak species, and conquer mysterious monsters. And you can play with your friends.
detailed_description:
This is a classic game where big fishes swallow small fishes. Player act as a small fish at the beginning, and try to hunt smaller fishes and avoid bigger fishes' attack. The more fishes player swallow, bigger the size player will be, and stronger the player will be. Here, player will also need to face the threat from land such as toxic garbage, dangerous hunter with his fishing tools. What’s more, there are also some mysterious, terrible and extremely dangerous monsters in deep water. You will need to escape from them or come up with some methods to conquer them ,and finally become the most powerful and free one in this water.

More than 60 different types of fishes.

Complex conditions from the land.

Mysterious Monsters.

Complex and interesting game elements interaction.

Fun two-player mode that allows players to damage each other. It's up to you.
